name: **Multiple parties**: How to coordinate firm-wide AI visibility efforts?

mainEntity.name: **Multiple parties**: How to coordinate firm-wide AI visibility efforts?

acceptedAnswer.description:
**Centralize audit/PR under marketing lead, align all bios.** Consistent patterns essential.[2][1]

**Key factors:**
- Unified messaging
- Lawyer buy-in
- Shared recognitions
- Regular monitoring

**Form committee, assign directory pursuits.** Measure collectively.[3] **Team effort multiplies wins.**
